verses.text: Topa in kei tungah thu hong gen leuleu a
“Israel gamsungah mite in zat belin a neih paunak, ‘A pate in leenggah thuk ne a, a tate' ha kim,’ cihna pen bang a cihnopna ahi hiam
Kei pen a nungta Topa Pasian ka hih mah bangin kong genin-ah: Israel gamsungah hih paunak na zang nawn kei ding uh hi
Mi khempeuh keima-a' hi a, pate ahi a, tate ahi zongin keima-a' ahi hi. A mawh mipa bek si ding hi
“Gentehna-in mi a hoih mahmah, a thuman, a diktat mi khat om hi

Amah in Israel mite' milim biakte biakpihlo a, milim biakna pialo ding, ci-in a kikhamna munah milim biakna sate zong nelo hi. Midangte' zi zong luppih dingin zollo a, numei in nin a neih laitakin zong luppihlo hi
Kuamah khemlo a, kuama na zong sutlo hi. Sum leitawi a lapa in khapna van a apte zong piakik hi. Gilkialte an vakin, puan neilote puan guan hi
A meet bekbek lunggulhna-in sum leitawi pialo hi. Gamtatsiat ding utlo a, mite' thu a manin khensak hi
Amah in ka thupiakte mangin, ka thukhamte hoihtakin zui hi. Tua bang mi pen mihoih ahih manin nungta ding hi, Topa Pasian in ci hi
“Tua ciangin gentehna-in hih mihoihpa in tapa khat nei a, tua tapa in mi' na gu-in mi that a, a pa' gamtat ngeiloh a siateng gamta hi
Amah in milim biakna pialo ding a kici munah a kipia biakna sate ne a, midangte' zite zolin luppih hi
Mizawng mi cimawhte khemin, mi' na sut a, sum leitawi a lapa in khapna-in a piak nate piakik loin kemsuak hi. Milim bia-in a zumhuai-in gamta hi

A meet lunggulhna-in sum leitawi pia a, a meet zong a kilawm loin tampi tak la hi. Hih bang mipa nungta ding ahi hiam? Nungta hetlo ding hi. Hih bangin a mindaihuaite khempeuh gamta ahih manin tuate' hangin amah si ding hi. Ama sihna pen ama mawhna hang ahi hi
“Gentehna-in hih mihoihlopa in tapa khat hong nei hi. Tua a tapa in a pa' gamtat hoihlohna teng mu a, a pa' gamtat bangin gamtalo hi
Israel mite' milim biakte biakpihlo a, a kikhamna munah biakna-in a kipia biakna sa zong nelo hi. Midangte' zi zollo a, zong luppihlo hi
Kuamah bawlsialo a, kuama na zong sutlo hi. Sum leitawi a lapa in a khapna van a apte zong piakik hi. Gilkialte an vak a, puan neilote puan guan hi
Gamtatsiat ding utlo a, a meet bekbek lunggulhna-in sum leitawi pialo hi. Ka thukhamte zui-in ka thupiakte mang hi. Tua ahih manin hih mipa pen nungta ding a, a pa' mawhna hangin si hetlo ding hi
A pa in ahih leh mi' na sutin, mite tungah a sia gamta tawntung hi. Tua ahih manin ama mawhna hangin amahmah si hi

“Ahi zongin, ‘Bang hangin a pa' mawhna a tapa in thuaklo ding ahi hiam?’ nong ci khading uh hi. A tapa a hoih a manin a gamtatna hang ahi hi. Amah in ka thukhamte kemin hoihtakin zui hi. Tua ahih manin pelloin amah nungta ding hi

A si dingpa pen a mawh mipa ahi hi. Ta in pa' mawhna thuaklo ding a, tua mah bangin pa in ta' mawhna thuaklo ding hi. Mihoihpa in a hoihna thaman ngah ding a, migilopa in a gitlohna thaman thuak ding hi.
“Migilo khat in a mawh bawlna khawlin ka thukham zui hen la, a hoih a manin gamta leh, tua mipa silo ding a, pelloin nungta ding hi
Ama mawhnasa khempeuh kimaisak ding a, amah a manin a gamtat manin nungta ding hi
Migilo khat a si ka muh ciangin a lungdam dingin hong ngaihsun na hi uh hiam? Ka lung dam hetlo hi. Amah hong kisikin a nuntak ding pen keima deih ahi zaw hi

Ahi zongin mihoih khat in a gamtat hoihnateng khawlin, migilote' gamtat bangin a mindaihuai gamtatsiate gamtat ding hong kipan leh, amah nungta paisuak ding ahi hiam? Nungta hetlo ding hi. A hoih ama gamtatnasate kiphawksaklo ding hi. Ama cihtaklohna leh ama mawhna hangin si ding hi
“Ahi zongin note in, ‘ Topa' hihna zia manlo hi,’ na ci uh hi. Israel mite aw, ka thugen hong ngai un. Keima hihna zia a manloin ngaihsun na hi uh hiam? A manlo pen nomau' ngaihsutna zia hizaw hi
Mihoih khat a gamtat hoih khawlin mawhna a bawl ciangin si ding hi. Ama sihna pen a gamtatsiatna hang ahi hi
Migilo khat a gitlohna panin khawlin a hoih a manin gamta leh ama nuntakna a suahtak ahi hi
Amah in a gamtatna phawkin a mawh bawlna khawl hi. Tua ahih manin amah si hetlo ding a, nungta paisuak ding hi
Ahi zongin no Israel mite in, ‘ Topa' hihna zia manlo hi,’ na ci uh hi. Israel mite aw, keima hihna zia manlo ahi zenzen hiam? A manlo pen nomau' ngaihsutna zia hizaw hi

“Topa Pasian ahi keimah in note kiangah kong genin-ah: Israel mite aw, na gamtatnasa bang ciatun thu kong khen ding hi. Kisik kikin na gamtatsiatna khempeuh panun khawl un la, na mawhna hangun kisisak kei un
Na gamtatnasa uh mawhna khempeuh nusia un la, na lungsim uh leh na ngaihsutna uh thaksuaksak un. Bang hangin no Israel mite si nuam na hi uh hiam
Kuama sih ding ka deih kei hi. Tua ahih manin na mawh gamtatna uh khawlin nungta un, Topa Pasian in ci hi,” a hong ci hi.
